4074941.title: HM Prison Durham

pageprops.wikibase-shortdesc: Prison in the city of Durham, England

4074941.description: Prison in the city of Durham, England
4074941.extract: HM Prison Durham is a Georgian era reception Category B men's prison, located in the Elvet area of Durham in County Durham, England. Built in 1819, the prison is operated by His Majesty's Prison Service. Its women prisoners were all moved out to other prisons in 2005 due to overcrowding and suicides.
